item.title: Unlinked_Pages
item.description: Unlinked Notes README Back escape direction Cross collar grip break to takedown Collar grip break downward Grip break on upper back Double under Closed guard figure 8 Double ankle grab pass Knee slice Toreando Leg drag Closed guard standing up S grip Straight ankle lock Two grip choke on turtle Clos...

item.title: Empty_Pages
item.description: Empty Notes Figure-four grip Gogoplata Kimura Canto choke North south Rubber guard Double leg De La Riva sweep .

item.title: Recently_Updated
item.description: Recently Updated Notes index Single leg Fireman throw Double leg Triangle Escape Three sisters Buggy choke Crusifix Bow and arrow Kimura & Americana .

item.title: Gi
item.description: General Jujutsu’s garment that is used unless participating in no-gi or “lukkopaini”.

item.title: Neck related
item.description: General These are warm ups that aim to strengthen the neck and support Moves Handstand Start of by posting head and hands on mat.

item.title: Arm drag
item.description: Both arms on opponents single arm and sweeping motion downward, forcing the opponent to lose balance and likely post with knee and/or other hand Control sleeve with “inner” arm in downward motion and transition to Single leg “Hopping” around can be stopped by hooking behind the leg Can be used as pa...

item.title: Ankle pick
item.description: General Get a Thumb and cuff grip on the opponents Sleeve on the same side.

item.title: Lapel
item.description: General Usually in clothing the lapel is the “chest” area, but in BJJ it is referring to the end of the clothing below the belt.

item.title: Sleeve
item.description: General Sleeves are essential part of many grips and holds and they give superior pulling capabilities.
